name: Payhere
description: Payhere — Sri Lanka payment gateway supporting Visa, Mastercard, and local bank cards with hosted checkout and recurring billing.

seo.title: Payhere — Payment Gateway / PSP
seo.meta_description: Payhere: Payhere — Sri Lanka payment gateway supporting Visa, Mastercard, and local bank cards with hosted checkout and recurring billing.

when_to_use: Accepting Visa, Mastercard, and local Sri Lankan bank cards
Hosted checkout integration for Sri Lanka e-commerce merchants
Recurring billing for Sri Lankan subscription-based services

pros: Covers Sri Lanka Visa, Mastercard, local cards
review.verdict: The pragmatic default for Sri Lankan merchants, but scope is narrow and tooling modest.
review.best_for: Sri Lankan SMBs and SaaS needing local card acceptance with recurring billing
review.not_for: Merchants needing cross-border reach or advanced fraud tooling
